title: Sterling-Silver Ruby Pendant — Retouched Hero Shots, Color-Matched Set, Vectorized Calligraphy Mark, Moodboard & Spec-Sheet Export
one_line_ask: Turn the client's raw photos of a finished Sterling-Silver 925 ruby pendant into a retouched, color-consistent hero product-photo set with a clean white-background cut-out, an reframe-cropped banner, a vectorized Arabic-calligraphy hallmark, a Firefly moodboard, and an exported lookbook/spec sheet.

issues: Slight vignetting at bottom edge may need minor correction
Left edge crops into calligraphy — full inscription not visible, but acceptable as source crop for designer to work with
Minimal depth-of-field fall-off toward left side is within brief parameters
panel.text_found: رسول بلك (partial — left edge cropped, full text not fully visible)

issues: Very slight warm/silver tone rather than greener/cooler cast as specified, though overall exposure and mood are close to brief
Ruby cabochon latch visible but partially obscured by angle — acceptable for bench-shot feel
Minimal luminance noise present but within acceptable range for source asset
Very slight perspective tilt (~3°) — within acceptable source-file tolerance
Minimal directional light differentiation; shadow gradient is subtle but adequate
Nap texture is present but very fine — designer may need to enhance for print

panel.text_found:

اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ

issues: Very slight tilt (~3-4 degrees clockwise) — within acceptable brief tolerance
Slightly underexposed as intended — shadow detail on left hinge edge is marginally crushed
Background is near-black rather than charcoal-grey gradient, slightly darker than brief specifies but workable
Ruby gemstone rendering is convincing but facet detail is marginally soft at 100% crop
Left side Arabic calligraphy column is partially obscured by hinge shadow — minor
